title: Ultimate warhammer mod
description: This mod in the earliest stages of development so please don't be rude about it. However feel free to give tips and report bugs. As of now it includes the armour of a space marine and a ore to create their is also a chainsword made from the same material.
body:
This mod in the earliest stages of development so please don't be rude about it. However feel free to give tips and report bugs. As of now it includes the armour of a space marine and a ore to create their is also a chainsword made from the same material. As well as a bolt gun. These allow you gain more powerful than netherite amour for late game play as of now the armour may be a bit over powered so feel free to give a more balanced example. The boltgun allows you to have a better version of the bow.

In the latest update by badwolfunit adds basic chaos features such as:

.world eaters ( and other Chaos space marine faction but I'm a world eaters guy so this is my top priority) armour
.the warp transports you to 100ish blocks in overworld per 1 block travel in the warp.
biomes for the warp including all of the chaos gods individual realms.
.dæmons and chaos cultists
.a heavy bolter (with too much recoil)
Im on youtube as Skibloos check out my videos if ive made them!

Ultimate warhammer show off
